subject: Using M to Refine Membrane Proteins
body:
Hi all,
I'm currently refining a membrane protein using M, and wanted to crowd 
source some opinion about the best way to do this. 

Currently, I'm using the Refine half maps from RELION, in combination with 
a Mask generated by RELION where I include the membrane (I just threshold 
the structure from a masked postprocess job, and use that).

I was wondering about using other strategies with this however. As per a 
previous thread on here (several years ago) there was a suggestion to use 
OccuPy to reduce the membrane signal in the reference itself (I assume the 
half maps). I was wondering if anyone has tried this?

The other option I was considering was to simply not include the membrane 
in the mask. The protein has a pretty large cytosolic domain (it's ATP 
synthase) so I assume that's enough signal. 

Interested if anyone has any thoughts, or suggestions!

Thanks
Euan
